buggy_variants.description: Expires events only when older than cutoff, wrongly keeping boundary timestamp.
Rejects equal timestamps by requiring strictly increasing timestamps.
total(ts,key=None) returns number of active keys instead of sum of active amounts.
add returns global total after insert rather than that key's current total.
Expiration subtracts 1 per expired event, ignoring the event amount.
Accepts amount 0 by only rejecting negative amounts.
